title: Universal Gas Struts Ball Joint Heads 2 Pieces for Kitchen Cabinets Caravan Doors Wardrobes and Toolboxes Force 300N Length 150MM to 1000MM (350MM)
features: OPEN LENGHT = 150/200/250/300/350/400/450/500/550/600/650/700/750/800/850/900/950/1000 MM (Measurements from centre hole to centre hole when fully extended)
NOTE: On average, 300N can lift 30 kg
Force Selection Example: On average, 300N can lift 30 kg
Dimensions - Compatibility: Before purchasing, please check the product’s open length, stroke, and force rating to ensure compatibility with your existing system
All Universal Gas Struts are listed by their open length and are shipped fully extended due to the internal gas pressure. Installation should be planned accordingly
FOR MULTI-PURPOSE = Boot, Bonnet, Car Conversion, Caravans, Cabinet, Rebuilt Projects, Doors, Windows, Tool Box, Hatches on Boats etc
PLEASE NOTE = If you are unsure if it is the right part, please message us the information about where you will use it. Let's Check The Accuracy
